_comment: Connection-manifest for the Video department. verify-wiring.sh reads this and checks each required cfg_key.

connection_points.name: ghl-api-key
connection_points.description: GoHighLevel API key for the Video department to upload completed video assets and thumbnails to the GHL media library.

connection_points.name: ghl-location-id
connection_points.description: GHL location ID for targeting the correct sub-account media library.

connection_points.name: google-drive-delivery-folder
connection_points.description: Google Drive folder ID where the Video department deposits final video deliverables.
